Hi!

I’m Paul Houser,
a software engineer and graphic designer,
I make websites.
I draw compulsively.
I like to build things out of junk.
I love coffee.
No, really, I love coffee.
I can’t stress that enough.

Oh yeah, and I have a beautiful wife and a wonderful son,
I love them a lot too.

Coffee.

Contact Me | Privacy Policy

Sugar2Salt

Sugar2Salt

(designed & developed for PointA)

Complete design and development by me, for this local gourmet farm-to-table eatery.

Listing Rotator

Listing Rotator

You would never expect a simple image slider to be so complicated. Let me tell you about it some time…

Complete design & development by me, using RETS API technology to dynamically pull property listings from several real estate data sources.

Oneupweb.com

Oneupweb.com

Complete branding refresh, redesigned page templates, and fresh front-end development for the agency of my employment. Co-designed with Nic Emenhiser

Oryana

Oryana.coop

(a Oneupweb client)

Design by Nic Emenhiser with some additional templating & layout by myself, all development by me.

An experiment in building a site entirely on the AMP framework. I wouldn’t recommend it. Ask me about that…

ProperyOwnerData.com

ProperyOwnerData.com

A filtering, search, and mapping engine for browsing and exporting millions of property listings at a time. Even prints labels.

Somehow managed to not bring MySQL to its knees. Ask me about that…
